results.description: Total nodes in Neo4j graph (running on VPS bracc-neo4j container)
results.command:
ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 -i ~/.ssh/hetzner_ed25519 root@204.168.217.125 \
  'curl -s -u neo4j:"$(docker exec bracc-neo4j env | grep NEO4J_AUTH | cut -d= -f2 | cut -d/ -f2)" \
  http://localhost:7474/db/neo4j/query/v2 \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"statement\":\"MATCH (n) RETURN count(n) as nodes\"}"' \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['data']['values'][0][0])"

ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 -i ~/.ssh/hetzner_ed25519 root@204.168.217.125 \
  'curl -s -u neo4j:"$(docker exec bracc-neo4j env | grep NEO4J_AUTH | cut -d= -f2 | cut -d/ -f2)" \
  http://localhost:7474/db/neo4j/query/v2 \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"statement\":\"MATCH ()-[r]->() RETURN count(r) as rels\"}"' \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['data']['values'][0][0])"

results.description: Distinct node labels (entity types) in Neo4j graph
results.command:
ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 -i ~/.ssh/hetzner_ed25519 root@204.168.217.125 \
  'curl -s -u neo4j:"$(docker exec bracc-neo4j env | grep NEO4J_AUTH | cut -d= -f2 | cut -d/ -f2)" \
  http://localhost:7474/db/neo4j/query/v2 \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "{\"statement\":\"CALL db.labels() YIELD label RETURN count(label) as n\"}"' \
  | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['data']['values'][0][0])"

results.description: Python source files in api/ and etl/ packages
